title: Recidiviz Document Collection Config
description: Configuration schema for document collection YAML files.

description.description: A meaningful description of this document collection.

root_entity_id_type.description: The type of root entity ID used to associate documents with entities.

document_metadata_columns.description: A list of metadata columns for documents in this collection.

name.description: The column name, must be a valid BigQuery identifier.

field_type.description: The BigQuery SQL type for this column.

is_document_primary_key.description: If true, this column is part of the document's primary key.

document_generation_query.description: A SQL query template that generates documents.
